inputs.label: Average Monthly Revenue (ARPU)
inputs.businessContext: Average revenue obtained from a customer per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average revenue obtained from a customer per month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir müşteriden aylık olarak elde edilen ortalama gelir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso promedio obtenido de un cliente por mes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الإيرادات المحققة من عميل واحد شهريًا.

inputs.label: Gross Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Gross profit percentage obtained from each unit of product/service sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of gross profit from each unit of product/service sold.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satılan her birim ürün/hizmetten elde edilen brüt kar yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Bruttogewinns pro verkaufter Einheit Produkt/Dienstleistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de marge brute sur chaque unité de produit/service vendue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de beneficio bruto obtenido por cada unidad de producto/servicio vendida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الربح الإجمالي من كل وحدة منتج/خدمة مباعة.

inputs.label: Monthly Churn Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Rate indicating how much of the customer base is lost each month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate indicating how much of the customer base is lost each month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her ay müşteri tabanının ne kadarının kaybedildiğini gösteren oran.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rate, die angibt, wie viel des Kundenstamms jeden Monat verloren geht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux indiquant la proportion de la clientèle perdue chaque mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la base de clientes que se pierde cada mes.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate used to find the present value of future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual discount rate used to find the present value of future cash flows.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarının bugünkü değerini bulmak için kullanılan yıllık iskonto oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Diskontsatz zur Berechnung des Barwerts zukünftiger Zahlungsströme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'actualisation annuel utilisé pour calculer la valeur actuelle des flux de trésorerie futurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de descuento anual utilizada para calcular el valor presente de los flujos de efectivo futuros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الخصم السنوي المستخدم لحساب القيمة الحالية للتدفقات النقدية المستقبلية.

inputs.label: Total Acquisition Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total marketing and sales expenses in a given period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total marketing and sales expenses in a given period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli bir dönemdeki toplam pazarlama ve satış harcamaları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Marketing- und Vertriebsausgaben in einem bestimmten Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses totales de marketing et de vente sur une période donnée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos totales de marketing y ventas en un período determinado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الإنفاق على التسويق والمبيعات خلال فترة معينة.

inputs.label: Number of New Customers Acquired
inputs.businessContext: Number of new customers acquired in the same period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of new customers acquired in the same period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı dönemde kazanılan yeni müşteri sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der im selben Zeitraum gewonnenen Neukunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de nouveaux clients acquis au cours de la même période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de nuevos clientes adquiridos en el mismo período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد العملاء الجدد المكتسبين خلال نفس الفترة.
